headlines: On pace vs. the linear path to your 2035 target.
Carbon intensity is 37.0% better than the Industrial / manufacturing peer band.

tips: Inventory looks solid. Next: save a board scenario and export the PDF briefing.

actions.title: Electrify process heat & fleet
actions.detail: Replace gas boilers and yard equipment; pair with a renewable PPA so load shift does not rebound.

actions.title: Lock in cleaner electricity
actions.detail: Pursue on-site solar, VPPA, or utility green tariff. Highest ROI when electrification is also planned.

actions.title: Cut travel & commute emissions
actions.detail: Hybrid work policy, rail-first travel rules, and EV commute incentives.

actions.title: Engage top suppliers on Scope 3
actions.detail: Request primary data from top 20 suppliers by spend; set contractual reduction clauses.

actions.title: Building & process efficiency
actions.detail: Controls, insulation, compressed air leaks, and LED/HVAC upgrades with <3 year payback.

actions.title: Product & packaging redesign
actions.detail: Material substitution and circular design for downstream use-phase and end-of-life.

roadmap.summary: Prioritized abatement for Acme Manufacturing. Near-term actions could abate roughly 29,959 t CO₂e — enough to close most of the forecast gap if implemented with cleaner power.
